title: Why We Feel in Control: A Lesson From Private Equity
description: Private equity offers a compelling lens through which to examine one of investing's most subtle psychological risks: the illusion of control, and what it means for decision-making in complex, uncertain environments.

title: Overreliance on AI Is Not an Effective Strategy
description: AI has transformed how we work, but overreliance on it carries real risks — for creativity, skill development, and organisational reputation. Three considerations for navigating it wisely.

title: An Overlooked Characteristic of Effective Business Leaders: Emotional Intelligence
description: IQ gets most of the attention, but for leaders, emotional intelligence may matter more. Three practical applications for understanding your impact, communicating better, and balancing empathy with action.
